topic: Everything different about the first 48-team World Cup (WC 2026 new format explained)

hook.spoken_hook: The World Cup you grew up with is gone. Here's everything that's different.

scenes.voiceover: The World Cup you grew up with is gone. Here's everything that's different.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Deep black background, bold white condensed headline 'EVERYTHING THAT CHANGED', a gold World Cup trophy silhouette dissolving into pixels, gold gradient accents #F7D774 to #C8881B, vertical 9:16.

scenes.voiceover: First up, forty-eight teams. That's sixteen more nations than ever before.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Black background, enormous gold gradient '48', small struck-through '32' beside it, white label 'TEAMS', condensed broadcast type, vertical 9:16.

scenes.voiceover: It's the first World Cup ever shared by three nations — the USA, Canada, and Mexico.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Black background, bold white '3 HOST NATIONS', three subtle flag-color accent bars (USA, Canada, Mexico), gold underline, vertical 9:16.

scenes.voiceover: That means a hundred and four matches, packed into thirty-nine days — the biggest World Cup in history.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Black background, giant gold '104', white label 'MATCHES / 39 DAYS', faint stadium-light bokeh, condensed type, vertical 9:16.
scenes.visual_query: huge football crowd packed stadium under bright floodlights

scenes.voiceover: And there's a brand-new round. Twelve groups now, and even some third-placed teams sneak into the Round of thirty-two.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Black background, glowing gold 'ROUND OF 32', a simple bracket path graphic with one highlighted '3rd PLACE' slot advancing, white condensed type, vertical 9:16.

scenes.voiceover: Bigger than it's ever been. But is it better — or just watered down? Tell me.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Black background, World Cup trophy lit in warm gold, bold white question 'BETTER OR WATERED DOWN?', drawn gold arrow pointing down to a comment prompt, vertical 9:16.

comment_bait: 48 teams and 104 games — better than ever, or watered down?
music_mood: Modern epic build, big brassy hits, anticipation rising

thumbnail.concept: Giant gold 48 over a fractured World Cup trophy, 'WHAT CHANGED' subtext

youtube_title: The 2026 World Cup Is Completely Different — Here's Everything That Changed
youtube_description: 48 teams. 104 matches. 3 host nations. A brand-new Round of 32. The 2026 World Cup is the biggest format change since 1998 — here's everything that's different in 30 seconds. Better, or watered down? #worldcup2026
instagram_caption: 48 teams. 104 matches. 39 days. 3 countries. A whole new Round of 32. The 2026 World Cup is the biggest the tournament has ever been — but is it actually better, or just watered down? Tell me below 👇
tiktok_caption: The World Cup completely changed and nobody explained it… until now. Better or watered down? 👇
